title: Warm Chinese Morcilla Biryani
description: A savory and umami one-pot Chinese dish featuring morcilla, this Warm Chinese Morcilla Biryani is a perfect meal for any time of day, with its chewy texture and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. It is cooked in a ramekin for a unique presentation.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the morcilla to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the turmeric, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the jasmine rice to the skillet, stirring to combine with the morcilla mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a ramekin and cover it with aluminum foil.
Bake the biryani in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
